name: Unpaid Test Task Free Work Exploitation
description: Scammer uses a high hourly rate bait to demand unpaid test work before signing a fake contract

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I reviewed your Upwork profile — impressive! I'd like to offer you an ongoing contract at $85/hr.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: That sounds great! What does the project involve?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: You must first complete a test task this week without pay to demonstrate your skills, then we sign the full contract.

red_flags: High hourly rate bait to attract compliance
Deferred contract promise that never materializes
